arts.ttl: Toughness can help Republic of Ireland ‘shine’ says Heimir Hallgrimsson
arts.sum: The Icelander wants to find a new Aron Gunnarsson.

arts.ttl: Greece v Republic of Ireland: All you need to know
arts.sum: The Greeks are coming into Sunday's match at Piraeus' Karaiskakis Stadium off the back of beating group favourites England 2-1 at Wembley to make it three wins from three in this edition of the Nations League. Watch Greece v Republic of Ireland in the UEFA Nations League on Sunday from 7pm on RTÉ2 and RTÉ Player.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley wants to see reaction from England against Finland after Greece loss
arts.sum: The Euro 2024 runners-up’s hopes of securing promotion back to the top tier of the Nations League received a blow with defeat to Greece.

arts.ttl: 5 talking points as England look to respond to Greece defeat against Finland
arts.sum: Helsinki is the next Nations League stop for Lee Carsley’s men.

arts.ttl: Talking points as Republic of Ireland chase back-to-back wins against Greece
arts.sum: Ireland opened their Group B2 account with a 2-1 victory in Finland.

arts.ttl: Ireland primed for front-foot approach to Greece game
arts.sum: "Mark McGuinness is not ready to play so we decided with Luton just to send him home," said Hallgrimsson, speaking at the pre-match press conference at the stadium. A spirited finish in Finland resulted in Robbie Brady crashing home the winning goal following some excellent work from Festy Ebosele, and the manager believes that Ireland are at their best when they play on the front foot.

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka withdraws from the England squad after picking up injury in Greece defeat - as Liverpool star also drops out of Finland clash
arts.sum: Saka was forced off injured in this international break's opening tie against Greece at Wembley on Thursday evening, ramping up concerns from national team and Arsenal fans alike.

arts.ttl: Heimir Hallgrimsson wants teams to hate playing his Republic of Ireland side
arts.sum: Ireland beat Finland 2-1 in Helsinki on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley makes England vow despite Greece failure: 'It didn’t come off but we go again'
arts.sum: Lee Carsley suffered the first setback of his interim tenure as England boss, with the embarrassing Wembley defeat to Greece a big blow to his hopes of being permanent manager - despite his continued refusal to discuss it

arts.ttl: Jordan Pickford insists England ‘weren’t far off’ despite dismal Greece defeat
arts.sum: The goalkeeper watched on as an attacking line-up misfired in a 2-1 defeat to Greece at Wembley
